data.title: Tactile Medical to Release First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: Minneapolis-based medical technology company Tactile Systems Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: TCMD) disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 on Monday, May 4, 2026 after the market closes. Tactile Medical, known for offering therapies to individuals with chronic disorders, is set to provide investors and stakeholders with key insights into its recent operational and financial achievements. This announcement highlights the company's commitment to transparency and communication with the market. Stay tuned for detailed figures and analysis following the release date.

data.title: Superior Group of Companies to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) based in St. Petersburg, FL, revealed that it is set to unveil its first quarter 2026 performance results on May 4, 2026, before the market opens. The Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Michael Benstock, alongside President and Chief Financial Officer, Mike Koempel, will conduct a teleconference at 8:00 am Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the Company’s outcomes.

data.title: Amwell® to report first quarter 2026 operating results
data.description: Boston-based company Amwell, listed on the NYSE as AMWL, will release its operating results for the first quarter of 2026 after the stock market closes on Tuesday, May 5. Amwell is a prominent provider of a SaaS-based software platform for technology-driven healthcare services.

data.title: CNB Financial Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: CNB Financial Corporation, the parent company of CNB Bank, recently disclosed its earnings for the first quarter of 2026. The corporation, listed as CCNE on NASDAQ, operates in Clearfield, Pennsylvania.

data.title: RBB Bancorp Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.16 Per Common Share
data.description: On April 20, 2026, RBB Bancorp disclosed financial data for the quarter finishing on March 31, 2026. This Los Angeles-based company, which includes Royal Business Bank and RBB Asset Management Company, reported its results. The Company, traded on NASDAQ under RBB, shared these updates from the first quarter of the year.

data.title: Columbia Financial, Inc. Announces Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Fair Lawn-based Columbia Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLBK) announced its quarterly financial results. The company, serving as the mid-tier holding entity for Columbia Bank, disclosed a net income of $13.1 million, translating to earnings of $0.13 per basic and diluted share for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. In comparison, the figures for the same period in 2025 were $8.9 million and $0.09 per basic and diluted share, respectively. The rise in earnings was primarily due to increased net interest income resulting from a rise in interest income and a decline in interest expense. Additionally, there was a decrease in provision for credit losses. These positives were partially offset by reduced non-interest income, an increase in non-interest expense, and higher income tax expense for the quarter.

data.title: Stella McCartney Executive Sues LVMH, Alleging Retaliation, Pay Discrimination, and Pricing Misconduct
data.description: Joseph & Norinsberg LLC, a prominent employment law firm based in New York, has recently lodged a federal complaint on behalf of a U.S. executive. The executive alleges retaliation following the disclosure of purported instances of anti-competitive behavior, salary discrepancies, and withheld wages. This complaint was filed on April 20, 2026. The executive's claims highlight serious issues within the company, shedding light on potential wrongdoings. The case brings attention to the importance of protecting employees who speak out against such practices. The legal action seeks to address the alleged violations and provide necessary recourse for the affected individual.

data.title: BBOT Granted U.S. FDA Fast Track Designation for BBO-11818 for the Treatment of Adult Patients with Advanced KRAS-Mutant Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma
data.description: BBO-11818 is currently undergoing assessment in the Phase 1 KONQUER-101 study, focusing on individuals with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic solid tumors containing the KRAS mutation.

data.title: FIRST FINANCIAL BANK ANNOUNCES GREATER HOUSTON LEADERSHIP APPOINTMENTS
data.description: In Abilene, Texas on April 20, 2026, the Board of Directors of First Financial Bank, a subsidiary of First Financial Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIN), revealed significant senior leadership adjustments for the Greater Houston Region. Rodney Nabors has been appointed as the new Regional CEO as part of these changes.

data.title: TDH Holdings, Inc. Reports Full Year 2025 Audited Financial Results
data.description: On April 20, 2026, TDH Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PETZ) revealed its fiscal year 2025 financial results. The PRC-based company, specializing in operating and managing commercial real estate, announced significant figures for the year ending December 31, 2025.

data.title: Allison Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Allison Transmission Holdings Inc., a leading provider of high-performance mobility and work solutions tailored for modern industrial demands, revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the initial quarter of 2026. The announcement was made on April 20, 2026, in Indianapolis. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALSN, is recognized globally for its innovative products. Stay tuned for further updates on the specific numbers and details from this financial report.

data.title: Cryoport to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on April 20, 2026, Cryoport, Inc. (Nasdaq: CYRX) disclosed details about its upcoming financial report. Cryoport is a prominent global company offering temperature-controlled supply chain services for the life sciences sector. The company will share its financial results for the specified period.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp. Announces Conditional Approval to Graduate to the Toronto Stock Exchange
data.description: Hemlo Mining Corp. (TSXV: HMMC) has been approved for uplisting alongside Canada's top gold producers. The Company will list its common shares on the Toronto Stock Exchange, marking a significant milestone in its growth. This move reflects Hemlo Mining's increasing prominence in the industry as it joins the ranks of premier gold producers.

data.title: Washington Trust Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Westerly, Rhode Island, on April 20, 2026, Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: WASH) announced its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company reported a net income of $12.6 million for the quarter, translating to $0.66 per diluted share. This figure marks a decrease from the previous year's first quarter net income of $16.0 million, or $0.83 per diluted share.

data.title: Harmonic Announces Reporting Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Harmonic, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol HLIT, has disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after the markets close on May 11, 2026. Following the release, a live webcast will be conducted at 2:00 p.m. PT on the same day to delve into the performance figures and other significant aspects of the Company's progress.

data.title: Leidos, Havoc integrate capabilities to advance maritime and air autonomy
data.description: In a bid to enhance operational capability, defense technology leaders are joining forces to integrate systems and foster collaborative autonomy. The collaboration, announced in National Harbor, Md. on April 20, 2026, brings together Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) and Havoc. This partnership aims to combine unmanned systems with collaborative autonomy to accelerate advancements in defense technology.

data.title: Regeneron Announces Investor Conference Presentations
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Tarrytown, New York, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) announced that they will be hosting a webcast featuring their management team. This event is scheduled for a future date and will be streamed online for all stakeholders and investors to access.
